headline: 5 Agriculture Operations Stocks to Watch Despite Trade-Related Challenges
summary: The Agriculture - Operations industry faces cost pressures and volatility, squeezing margins. Yet innovation and emerging market demand support growth. CTVA, ADM, SMG, AGRO and AVO look promising.
